pipelines.name: GenAI_Pipeline_on_CPU
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location={source[uri]} protocols=tcp latency=100 name=source ! rtph264depay ! h264parse ! avdec_h264 ! videoconvert ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA ! tee name=split allow-not-linked=true split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers={parameters[captioner_queue_size]} ! videorate drop-only=true ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,framerate={parameters[captioner_frame_rate]}/1 ! videoscale ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,width=[1,{parameters[frame_width]}],height=[1,{parameters[frame_height]}] ! gvagenai name=captioner device=CPU model-path="/home/pipeline-server/models/{parameters[captioner_model_name]}" generation-config="max_new_tokens={parameters[captioner_max_new_tokens]},num_beams=1,do_sample=false,temperature=0.1,repetition_penalty=1.1" scheduler-config="{parameters[captioner_scheduler_config]}" frame-rate={parameters[captioner_frame_rate]} chunk-size={parameters[captioner_chunk_size]} metrics=true ! gvametaconvert add-empty-results=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=MQTTPublisher function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/mqtt_publisher/mqtt_publisher.py name=mqtt_publisher ! fakesink sync=false async=false split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 ! appsink name=appsink sync=false

captioner-prompt.default: Describe what you see in the image in one sentence.

pipelines.name: GenAI_Pipeline_on_GPU
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location={source[uri]} protocols=tcp latency=100 name=source ! rtph264depay ! h264parse ! vah264dec ! vapostproc ! tee name=split allow-not-linked=true split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers={parameters[captioner_queue_size]} ! videorate drop-only=true ! video/x-raw,framerate={parameters[captioner_frame_rate]}/1 ! vapostproc ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,width=[1,{parameters[frame_width]}],height=[1,{parameters[frame_height]}] ! gvagenai name=captioner device=GPU model-path="/home/pipeline-server/models/{parameters[captioner_model_name]}" generation-config="max_new_tokens={parameters[captioner_max_new_tokens]},num_beams=1,do_sample=false,temperature=0.1,repetition_penalty=1.1" scheduler-config="{parameters[captioner_scheduler_config]}" model-cache-path="/tmp/ov_cache" frame-rate={parameters[captioner_frame_rate]} chunk-size={parameters[captioner_chunk_size]} metrics=true ! gvametaconvert add-empty-results=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=MQTTPublisher function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/mqtt_publisher/mqtt_publisher.py name=mqtt_publisher ! fakesink sync=false async=false split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 ! vapostproc ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA ! appsink name=appsink sync=false

pipelines.name: GenAI_Detection_Pipeline_on_CPU
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location={source[uri]} protocols=tcp latency=100 name=source ! rtph264depay ! h264parse ! avdec_h264 ! videoconvert ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA ! tee name=split allow-not-linked=true split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! videorate drop-only=true ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,framerate={parameters[captioner_frame_rate]}/1 ! videoscale ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA,width=[1,{parameters[frame_width]}],height=[1,{parameters[frame_height]}] ! gvadetect name=detection device=CPU model="/home/pipeline-server/detection_models/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/public/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/FP32/{parameters[detection_model_name]}.xml" threshold={parameters[detection_threshold]} ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! gvametaconvert format=json add-empty-results=false ! gvapython class=DetectionFilter function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/publisher/detection_filter.py name=detection_filter ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers={parameters[captioner_queue_size]} max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! gvagenai name=captioner device=CPU model-path="/home/pipeline-server/models/{parameters[captioner_model_name]}" generation-config="max_new_tokens={parameters[captioner_max_new_tokens]},num_beams=1,do_sample=false,temperature=0.1,repetition_penalty=1.1" scheduler-config="{parameters[captioner_scheduler_config]}" frame-rate={parameters[captioner_frame_rate]} chunk-size={parameters[captioner_chunk_size]} metrics=true ! gvametaconvert add-empty-results=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=MQTTPublisher function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/mqtt_publisher/mqtt_publisher.py name=mqtt_publisher ! fakesink sync=false async=false split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! videoconvert ! gvadetect name=detection_preview device=CPU model="/home/pipeline-server/detection_models/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/public/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/FP32/{parameters[detection_model_name]}.xml" threshold={parameters[detection_threshold]} ! appsink name=appsink sync=false

gvametaconvert add-empty-results=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=MQTTPublisher function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/gvapython/mqtt_publisher/mqtt_publisher.py name=mqtt_publisher ! fakesink sync=false async=false split. ! queue leaky=downstream max-size-buffers=1 max-size-time=0 max-size-bytes=0 ! vapostproc ! video/x-raw(memory:VAMemory),width=[1,{parameters[frame_width]}],height=[1,{parameters[frame_height]}] ! gvadetect name=detection_preview device=GPU model="/home/pipeline-server/detection_models/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/public/{parameters[detection_model_name]}/FP16/{parameters[detection_model_name]}.xml" threshold={parameters[detection_threshold]} pre-process-backend=va-surface-sharing batch-size=8 !
